zh.lifeSummary: 當Editha Constable於大約1439年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親Sir Robert Constable VI55歲，母親Agnes Gascoigne55歲。她和Thomas de Astley至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1486年在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年48歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Editha Constable于大约1439年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲Sir Robert Constable VI55岁，母亲Agnes Gascoigne55岁。她和Thomas de Astley至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1486年在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年48岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Editha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Editha Constable was born about 1439, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Constable VI, was 55 and her mother, Agnes Gascoigne, was 55. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Thomas de Astley. She died in 1486, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Evesham, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Editha Constable est née environ 1439, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Constable VI, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Agnes Gascoigne, avait 55 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Thomas de Astley. Elle est décédée en 1486, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Editha Constable um 1439 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Constable VI 55 und ihre Mutter Agnes Gascoigne 55. Sie hatte mit Thomas de Astley mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1486 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Evesham, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Evesham, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Editha Constable è nata il circa 1439 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Constable VI, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Agnes Gascoigne, aveva 55 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Thomas de Astley. Morì nel 1486, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Evesham, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Editha Constableが約1439年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Constable VIは55歳，母Agnes Gascoigneは55歳であった。彼女はThomas de Astleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1486年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムで48歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Editha Constable(이)가 대략 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Constable VI(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Gascoigne(은)는 55세였다. 그녀는 Thomas de Astley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Editha Constable nasceu aproximadamente 1439, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Constable VI, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Gascoigne, tinha 55 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Thomas de Astley. Ela faleceu em 1486, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Editha Constable родилась около 1439 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Constable VI было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Gascoigne, 55. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Thomas de Astley. Она умерла в 1486 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Editha Constable nació aproximadamente 1439, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Constable VI, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Agnes Gascoigne, tenía 55 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Thomas de Astley. Murió en 1486, en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
